zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Ugworthy於大約1400年出生在英國戴文素可姆時，她的父親John Ugworthy19歲，母親Mrs John Ugworthy15歲。她於1422年與John Gifford在英國戴文素可姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1444年在英國英格蘭戴文素可姆享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Ugworthy于大约1400年出生在英国戴文素可姆时，她的父亲John Ugworthy19岁，母亲Mrs John Ugworthy15岁。她于1422年与John Gifford在英国戴文素可姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1444年在英国英格兰戴文素可姆享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Ugworthy was born about 1400, in Sutcombe, Devon, England, her father, John Ugworthy, was 19 and her mother, Mrs John Ugworthy, was 15. She married John Gifford in 1422, in Sutcombe, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1444, in Sutcombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Ugworthy est née environ 1400, à Sutcombe, Devon, Angleterre, son père, John Ugworthy, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Mrs John Ugworthy, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé John Gifford en 1422, à Sutcombe, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1444, à Sutcombe, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Ugworthy um 1400 in Sutcombe, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Ugworthy 19 und ihre Mutter Mrs John Ugworthy 15. Sie hat 1422 in Sutcombe, Devon, England John Gifford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1444 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Sutcombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Ugworthy è nata il circa 1400 nel Sutcombe, Devon, England, sua padre, John Ugworthy, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Mrs John Ugworthy, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato John Gifford nel 1422, nel Sutcombe, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1444, nel Sutcombe, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Ugworthyが約1400年にイギリスデボンストコンベで生まれた時，父John Ugworthyは19歳，母Mrs John Ugworthyは15歳であった。1422年にイギリスデボンストコンベでJohn Giffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1444年にイギリスイギリスデボンストコンベで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Ugworthy(이)가 대략 1400년 영국 데폰 수트코브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Ugworthy(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs John Ugworthy(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1422년 영국 데폰 수트코브에서 John Gifford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1444년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 수트코브에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Sutcombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom: Sutcombe, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Ugworthy nasceu aproximadamente 1400, em Sutcombe, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Ugworthy, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Mrs John Ugworthy, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com John Gifford em 1422, em Sutcombe, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1444, em Sutcombe, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Ugworthy родилась около 1400 г. в местности суткомб, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени John Ugworthy было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs John Ugworthy, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Gifford в 1422 г. в местности суткомб, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1444 г. в местности суткомб, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Ugworthy nació aproximadamente 1400, en Sutcombe, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, John Ugworthy, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Mrs John Ugworthy, tenía 15 años. Se casó con John Gifford en 1422, en Sutcombe, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1444, en Sutcombe, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años.
